steps.title: Complete the Althing sentence
steps.content: The opening phrase, A government body officially known as the Althing, needs to be followed by a main clause that clearly identifies the Althing. The completed sentence should have a grammatical subject and verb and should describe the government body itself.

steps.title: Use a clear subject and verb
steps.content: A makes the year 930 CE the subject, B awkwardly leaves Iceland's dangling, and C makes the first meeting the subject instead of the Althing. The choice with Iceland's parliament as the subject and is as the verb correctly completes the sentence. The answer is D.
